overall.description: First-person exploration of the Astronomy Classroom in Hogwarts Legacy, beginning in a wooden antechamber with astronomical tapestries, entering a grand circular room with blue stained glass windows and an elaborate ceiling orrery, and concluding by ascending a wooden staircase.

events.description: NPC astronomer comes into view examining a tapestry through a telescope
approaching the stone archway leading to the classroom

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden antechamber observing astronomical tapestries and star charts

notable_agents.action: standing at a telescope examining a large astronomical tapestry on the wall

entered.detail: large blue tapestry depicting a figure with a telescope and star charts
circular tapestry showing a robed figure against a starry background
gothic stone archway leading to the main classroom
several framed portraits hanging on the wooden wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cozy wooden antechamber decorated with astronomical tapestries and portraits. An NPC stands at a telescope examining the wall hangings. The camera moves steadily forward toward a stone archway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular astronomy classroom with blue stained glass windows

events.description: passing through the archway into the Astronomy Classroom
ambient light shifts to deep blue from the tall stained glass windows
second NPC visible sitting by the stained glass window

agents.ego_description: entering the grand classroom and walking along the curved desks toward the windows

notable_agents.action: sitting on a stool near the stained glass window looking outside

entered.detail: tall gothic windows with intricate blue glass patterns emitting cool blue light
semicircular arrangement of wooden student desks with star charts embedded in the surface
elaborate mechanical structure with rotating brass rings suspended from the ceiling
ornate stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the archway into a magnificent circular classroom dominated by blue stained glass windows. The lighting shifts to a mystical blue hue. Curved wooden desks form a semicircle in the center, while an elaborate orrery hangs from the ceiling. An NPC sits quietly by the window as the camera explores the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: astronomy classroom interior with focus on ceiling mechanism

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full ceiling orrery mechanism
panning to show the rear of the classroom with fireplace and globe

agents.ego_description: panning upward to examine the ceiling orrery, then rotating to view the back of the classroom

entered.detail: stone fireplace with warm glowing embers on the back wall
large astronomical globe in an arched niche
wooden desk with papers and astronomical instruments

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to showcase the intricate brass orrery rotating against the blue vaulted ceiling. It then pans around the rear of the classroom, revealing a fireplace, a large astronomical globe, and the professor's desk. The blue stained glass windows move out of view as the camera focuses on the back wall features.

events.description: exiting the classroom back into the wooden antechamber
beginning to ascend the wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: exiting the classroom and climbing the wooden staircase to the upper level

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with timber beams leading upward
furniture covered with white sheets stacked under the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the blue-lit classroom back into the warmer wooden antechamber, passing the astronomical tapestries once more. It then approaches and begins ascending a narrow wooden staircase flanked by stone walls and covered furniture, leaving the classroom behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy wooden antechamber into a mystical, blue-lit astronomical classroom before returning to ascend a narrow staircase. It begins by moving steadily past astronomical tapestries and a telescope-watching NPC toward a stone archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the environment shifts into a grand circular room bathed in a mystical blue hue from stained glass windows, where curved desks sit beneath a rotating brass orrery. The view then tilts upward to capture the intricate ceiling mechanism before panning across a fireplace and a large astronomical globe at the rear of the classroom. Finally, the camera retreats back through the archway into the warm wooden antechamber, passing the tapestries once more as it begins ascending a narrow wooden staircase flanked by stone walls.
